words.def: someone who is licensed to operate an aircraft in flight
words.zh: n. 飛行員, 領航員, 航船者, 導向器, 駕駛儀, 嚮導, 領導人

words.def: a secret scheme to do something (especially something underhand or illegal)
words.zh: n. 小塊土地, 地區圖, 圖, 陰謀, 情節
n. 頂部, 頂端, 極點, 上面, 上部, 頂篷, 最高地位, 首位, 陀螺

words.def: a slippery or viscous liquid or liquefiable substance not miscible with water
words.zh: n. 油, 石油, 油畫顏料

words.def: (often followed by `of') a large number or amount or extent
words.zh: n. 運氣, 籤, 抽籤, 份額, 許多, 一堆
